sections.title: Objective Process Record
sections.body: Objective process record for quantitative signal development, review, monitoring, and variant control. This is intentionally strategy-neutral so it can support partner, investor, regulator, and internal model-review conversations.

sections.title: Variant Control
sections.body: Every material methodology, feature, weight, threshold, data-source, or execution-policy change should create a new model variant with owner, version, changelog, review criteria, activation date, and deprecation rule.

rows: Research hypothesis
State the economic rationale before scoring. A model should explain why an observable variable may forecast risk, return, liquidity, or execution quality.
Named hypothesis, target horizon, eligible markets, expected failure modes.
Data intake
Separate raw collection, normalization, scoring, and decision display. Vendor, public, and internal feeds must be source-labeled and timestamped.
Provider, refresh cadence, timestamp, transformation notes, missing-data policy.
Feature design
Prefer independent factor families over duplicate measures. Current families: trend/momentum, relative strength, volatility, credit/rates, positioning, breadth, news pressure, and liquidity.
Feature list, lookback, directionality, cap/winsorization rule, correlation review.
Scoring
Convert each feature into bounded scores, combine with documented weights, and expose both composite score and factor-level attribution.
Weights, factor contribution, confidence tier, score version, threshold table.
Decision policy
Advice must distinguish observation, watch, action, sizing, invalidation, and review horizon. Execution remains separate from signal generation.
Day plan, week plan, trigger, stop/invalidation, confidence downgrade rule.
Validation
Backtest and forward-monitor separately. Require out-of-sample checks, turnover/slippage assumptions, stale-data tests, and adverse-regime review.
Backtest window, holdout window, hit rate, drawdown, turnover, slippage, exceptions.
Governance
Every model variant gets a stable name, owner, version, changelog, activation date, and deprecation rule.
Registry entry, approval status, change reason, reviewer notes.
